case_title: VERA POON VS. STEPHEN LIGHTFOOT et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-01-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-01-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-09-2008 CONTINUED TO JUN-20-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR SERVICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-04-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-20-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-04-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF POON, VERA AS TO DEFENDANT LIGHTFOOT, STEPHEN BLEDSOE,CATHCART,DIESTEL & PEDERSEN STATE FARM INSURANCE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-09-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-05-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-24-2008
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: SCOTT HUGHES, CSR#12365. (212)
